programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right
programme.desc: Grieve with the family of a mum who fell victim to deadly mould in the attic.

programme.desc: Find out if a stain hides a scary secret and see a thorough wiring inspection.

programme.desc: Inspect a smelly, shivery kitchen addition with maxed-out electrical circuits.

programme.desc: Pore over a potential health hazard in a home deemed A-okay by a home inspector.

programme.desc: Appraise a gorgeous open concept house flip that turns out to be a total flop.

programme.desc: Observe Candice’s restorative surgery on a busy doctor’s flooded basement.

programme.desc: Cheer as Candice takes a living room from boring beige to fun and colourful.

programme.desc: Feel the cozy embrace of natural elements in a once featureless family rec room.

programme.desc: Say goodbye to disco-era style as Candice gives an epic waterbed the heave-ho.

programme.desc: Suss out state-of-the-art fixtures when two tech heads order a bathroom update.

programme.desc: Relax in the lap of luxury in short-term rentals designed for group vacationers.

programme.title: Coolest Places to Stay
programme.desc: Look around bustling urban areas to find oases of calm, comfort, and class.

programme.title: Coolest Places to Stay

programme.desc: See Mike’s smart framing strategy and deal with a steady stream of staff issues.

programme.desc: Seek shelter as endless rain and painful memories slow the team’s roofing job.

programme.desc: Visit the bustling job site, then get a lesson in local wetlands preservation.

programme.title: Holmes in New Orleans
programme.desc: Celebrate the happy result of weeks of hard work as Gloria finally comes home.
